name: Marinated Shark Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the shark steaks into service-sized pieces.
2. Place them in a glass dish.
3. Combine the soy sauce, vinegar, lemon juice, oil, chopped parsley, garlic, and black pepper.
4. Pour the marinade over the fish and marinate for half an hour, turning at least once.
5. Remove the fish (reserving the marinade) and broil 4 to 5 inches from the heat—about four minutes on each side. Brush with the marinade before turning.
6. Serve with minced green onions and parsley. Accompaniments: Rice and vegetable pilaf, leaf lettuce tossed with parsley-lemon dressing, and French or Italian sourdough bread.
